name: tiptap
label: Tiptap Editor
description: A rich-text WYSIWYG editor with a configurable toolbar (headings, lists, links, code) built on Tiptap. Works with wire:model. Lazy-loads its bundle on demand.

props.name: toolbar
props.default: bold | italic | underline | code | divider | heading_1 | heading_2 | heading_3 | divider | link | bulletList | orderedList | blockquote | codeBlock
props.description: Pipe-separated list of toolbar buttons; use 'divider' for separators.

usage: Requires the JS bundle: php artisan vendor:publish --tag=devdojo-assets
